generated_exposure.exposure_text:
🚨 Critical Alert: Foreign Influence in Our Defense Systems 🚨

Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for strategic autonomy is making us vulnerable? Recent reports show that key allies are exploiting our open systems to undermine national security. It's time to prioritize domestic solutions and strengthen our defenses. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
